'''âch-dh-m''' ('''kachadham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulchrify|pulchrify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulchrify|pulchrify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-dh-m
|-
! Lemma
| kachadham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichadham|thichadham]] || [[word:jichadham|jichadham]] || [[word:shichadham|shichadham]] || [[word:kichadham|kichadham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchadham|thuthuchadham]] || [[word:jujuchadham|jujuchadham]] || [[word:shushuchadham|shushuchadham]] || [[word:kukuchadham|kukuchadham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchadham|thuchadham]] || [[word:juchadham|juchadham]] || [[word:shuchadham|shuchadham]] || [[word:kuchadham|kuchadham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchadham|thuchadham]] || [[word:juchadham|juchadham]] || [[word:shuchadham|shuchadham]] || [[word:kuchadham|kuchadham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechadham|thechadham]] || [[word:jechadham|jechadham]] || [[word:shechadham|shechadham]] || [[word:kechadham|kechadham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochadham|thothochadham]] || [[word:jojochadham|jojochadham]] || [[word:shoshochadham|shoshochadham]] || [[word:kokochadham|kokochadham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochadham|thochadham]] || [[word:jochadham|jochadham]] || [[word:shochadham|shochadham]] || [[word:kochadham|kochadham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochadham|thochadham]] || [[word:jochadham|jochadham]] || [[word:shochadham|shochadham]] || [[word:kochadham|kochadham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchadham|thĂŠchadham]] || [[word:jĂŠchadham|jĂŠchadham]] || [[word:shĂŠchadham|shĂŠchadham]] || [[word:kĂŠchadham|kĂŠchadham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachadham|thathachadham]] || [[word:jajachadham|jajachadham]] || [[word:shashachadham|shashachadham]] || [[word:kakachadham|kakachadham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachadham|thachadham]] || [[word:jachadham|jachadham]] || [[word:shachadham|shachadham]] || [[word:kachadham|kachadham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachadham|thachadham]] || [[word:jachadham|jachadham]] || [[word:shachadham|shachadham]] || [[word:kachadham|kachadham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachadham|shachadham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachadham|goshachadham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachadham|gokishachadham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachadhamnĂŒ|shachadhamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachadhamnknĂŒ|goshachadhamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadhamnĂŒ|gokishachadhamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachadhamshĂ«|shachadhamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkshĂ«|goshachadhamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachadhamshĂ«|gokishachadhamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadhamro|shachadhamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkro|goshachadhamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadhamro|gokishachadhamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadhamu|shachadhamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkmu|goshachadhamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadhamu|gokishachadhamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachadhamsher|shachadhamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachadhamnksher|goshachadhamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachadhamsher|gokishachadhamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachadhamng|shachadhamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkng|goshachadhamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachadhamng|gokishachadhamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachadhamya|shachadhamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkya|goshachadhamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachadhamya|gokishachadhamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachadhamyam|shachadhamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkyam|goshachadhamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachadhamyam|gokishachadhamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachadhamnĂŒshĂ«|shachadhamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachadhamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachadhamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachadhamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachadhamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadhamnĂŒro|shachadhamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadhamnknĂŒro|goshachadhamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadhamnĂŒro|gokishachadhamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadhamnĂŒmu|shachadhamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadhamnknĂŒmu|goshachadhamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadhamnĂŒmu|gokishachadhamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachadhamshĂ«nĂŒ|shachadhamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachadhamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadhamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachadhamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadhamshĂ«ro|shachadhamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkshĂ«ro|goshachadhamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadhamshĂ«ro|gokishachadhamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadhamshĂ«mu|shachadhamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkshĂ«mu|goshachadhamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadhamshĂ«mu|gokishachadhamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachadhamronĂŒ|shachadhamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkronĂŒ|goshachadhamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadhamronĂŒ|gokishachadhamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachadhamroshĂ«|shachadhamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkroshĂ«|goshachadhamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachadhamroshĂ«|gokishachadhamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachadhamromu|shachadhamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkromu|goshachadhamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachadhamromu|gokishachadhamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachadhamunĂŒ|shachadhamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkmunĂŒ|goshachadhamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachadhamunĂŒ|gokishachadhamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachadhamushĂ«|shachadhamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkmushĂ«|goshachadhamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachadhamushĂ«|gokishachadhamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachadhamuro|shachadhamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachadhamnkmuro|goshachadhamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachadhamuro|gokishachadhamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
